name: HURCO COMPANIES INC
business: Hurco Companies, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells computerized CNC machine tools, including vertical machining centers and turning centers, along with proprietary software, automation equipment, and services, to companies in the metal cutting industry globally.
sellsTo: precision tool, die and mold manufacturers
specialized short-run production applications within large manufacturing operations
manufacturing facilities focusing on medium-to-high run production

exposures.sentence: We design, manufacture, and sell computerized (i.e., Computer Numeric Control (CNC)) machine tools, consisting primarily of vertical machining centers (mills) and turning centers (lathes), to companies in the metal cutting industry through a worldwide sales, service, and distribution network.
ProCobots, LLC (ProCobots) is our wholly-owned subsidiary that provides automation solutions, such as feeders, machine tending systems, and collaborative robots (cobots).
UltiMotion, our patented motion control system, provides significant cycle time reductions and increases the quality of a part’s surface finish.

catalysts.event: Launch of next generation VC 500 five-axis machining center
catalysts.sentence: The next generation VC 500 is expected to launch in early 2026.
